description: Escape to the serene beauty of Ise and Shima, where ancient shrines meet the tranquil coastline. This 3-day getaway is perfect for couples seeking a blend of spiritual exploration, gourmet dining, and relaxation. Immerse yourselves in the rich history of Ise Jingu, savor the exquisite flavors of Ise lobster and Matsusaka beef, and unwind in luxurious accommodations that offer breathtaking views of the ocean. Each day is designed to flow seamlessly, allowing you to soak in the local culture and indulge in the culinary delights at a leisurely pace.

days.title: Exploring Ise Jingu and Local Delicacies

activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at your hotel, featuring a mix of traditional Japanese dishes and Western options to energize you for the day ahead.

Explore the sacred grounds of Ise Jingu, one of Japan's most important Shinto shrines. The serene atmosphere and beautiful natural surroundings make it a perfect place for reflection and appreciation of Japanese culture.
Head to Okage Yokocho, a charming street lined with traditional shops and eateries. Enjoy a delicious meal featuring local specialties, including Ise lobster, in a lively atmosphere.
Take your time to wander through the quaint streets of Okage Yokocho, where you can shop for unique souvenirs and sample local snacks. Don't miss the chance to try some freshly made mochi!
A short drive from Ise Jingu, visit the iconic Wedded Rocks, a symbol of marriage and harmony. The view of the rocks against the backdrop of the ocean is breathtaking, especially during sunset.
Indulge in a sumptuous dinner featuring the famous Ise lobster. This restaurant is known for its fresh seafood and exquisite presentation, making it a perfect romantic dining experience.
After a fulfilling day, unwind at your hotel. Enjoy the amenities and perhaps take a dip in the onsen to relax your muscles and reflect on the day's experiences.

days.title: Relaxation and Scenic Beauty in Shima

activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at your hotel, featuring local specialties and fresh ingredients to energize you for the day ahead.

Explore the sacred grounds of Ise Jingu, one of Japan's most important Shinto shrines. The serene atmosphere and beautiful natural surroundings make it a perfect spot for reflection and appreciation of Japanese culture.
Indulge in a delicious meal featuring Ise shrimp, a local delicacy known for its sweet and tender flavor. Enjoy the fresh seafood in a cozy restaurant setting.
Take a scenic drive to Kashikojima, where you can enjoy stunning coastal views and perhaps visit the famous Pearl Island. The area is known for its beautiful landscapes and tranquil atmosphere.

Spend a leisurely afternoon at Shima Spain Village, a unique theme park that combines Spanish culture with Japanese hospitality. Enjoy the attractions, gardens, and perhaps a coffee break at one of the charming cafes.
Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring Matsusaka beef, renowned for its rich flavor and tenderness. This exquisite dining experience will be a highlight of your culinary journey in Shima.
After a fulfilling day, return to your hotel to unwind. Enjoy the amenities and perhaps take a stroll along the beach to end your day on a peaceful note.
Start your day with a delightful breakfast at your hotel, featuring local specialties that will energize you for the day ahead.
Explore the fascinating Toba Aquarium, home to a variety of marine life including dolphins and sea turtles. Don't miss the impressive jellyfish exhibit!

activities.activity: Lunch at a Local Seafood Restaurant
activities.description: Indulge in a delicious lunch featuring fresh Ise lobster, a local delicacy. Enjoy the flavors of the sea in a cozy restaurant with a view.
Visit Mikimoto Pearl Island, where you can learn about the history of pearl cultivation and even see the famous Ama divers in action. It's a unique cultural experience!
Return to your hotel for some leisure time. Enjoy the amenities, take a dip in the pool, or simply unwind in your room before departure.
Savor the exquisite Matsusaka beef at a renowned steakhouse. The tender, flavorful meat is a must-try for any food lover visiting the region.
